title: Anatomy of a Java Method
description: A flowchart illustrating the components and structure of a method definition in Java, showing how elements work together to create a functional unit.
elements: Method Signature (visibility, return type, name, parameters)
Local Variables (variables declared inside the method)
relationships: The signature defines the method's interface
The body contains the implementation logic
Parameters are passed into the body
Local variables are declared and used within the body
The return statement sends a value back to the caller, matching the declared return type
